meta.intent: Produce one instantly legible, high-stakes rescue beat with a hero puppy hanging over the flood and a clean route that reads in seconds even to a cold viewer.
meta.expectedPath: Clear the authored lower B triple to trigger the hero rescue immediately, then clear the compact upper-right A pair to free the secondary puppy and end the level cleanly.
meta.expectedFailMode: The player spends actions in the wrong pocket, misses the obvious lower rescue beat, and loses the simple capture read to avoidable pressure.
meta.whatItProves: The game has a genuinely captureable rescue sequence that resolves through the real action pipeline rather than a scripted fake.
meta.notes: This capture-safe layout uses roofed empty neighbors so extraction survives spawn-before-extract resolution: the lower B triple pops the hero rescue first, then the upper-right A pair opens the secondary finish.
